title: rubus caesius var. mitissimus
intro: Rubus caesius var. mitissimus, also known as the black-dragon or black raspberry, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the black raspberry plant, native to certain regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Rubus caesius var. mitissimus include its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and aid in the prevention of certain cancers. Rubus caesius var. mitissimus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
